title: Sugar, We're Goin Down
why_this_song: Sugar, We're Goin Down by Fall Out Boy (2005) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

We're going down, down in an earlier round

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "we're" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "we're" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "going" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "going" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Am I more than you bargained for yet?
And sugar, we're going down swinging
We're going down, down in an earlier round

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Fall Out Boy one question about "Sugar, We're Goin Down", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Fall Out Boy sobre "Sugar, We're Goin Down", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Sugar, We're Goin Down" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Sugar, We're Goin Down" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Sugar, We're Goin Down" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Sugar, We're Goin Down" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Sugar, We're Goin Down" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Sugar, We're Goin Down" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Sugar, We're Goin Down" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Sugar, We're Goin Down" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?
